example.conversation_history: Recruiter: Hi, thanks for submitting your application for our Python Developer role. Could you share a bit about your Python experience? Candidate: I have three years' experience with Django and Flask. Recruiter: Do you have any questions of your own?
example.latest_user_message: Could you share more about the company's cloud technologies?

example.conversation_history: Recruiter: Hi, thanks for submitting your application for our Python Developer role. Could you share a bit about your Python experience? Candidate: I have three years' experience with Django and Flask. Recruiter: We currently deploy to AWS using Docker and ECS.
example.latest_user_message: Sounds great! I'd be happy to schedule a meeting.

example.conversation_history: Recruiter: Hello! I saw your application for the Python Developer position—how long have you been working with Python? Candidate: I have three years' experience with Django and Flask. Recruiter: How about an interview Monday at 3 PM or Tuesday at 11 AM?
example.latest_user_message: I'm unavailable then; do you have any other times?

example.conversation_history: Recruiter: Hello! I saw your application for the Python Developer position—how long have you been working with Python? Candidate: I've been using Python professionally for five years. Recruiter: Could we schedule a chat this Friday at 11 AM or next Monday at 9 AM?
Recruiter: Could we schedule a chat this Friday at 11 AM or next Monday at 9 AM?
example.latest_user_message: Please remove me from your list. Thanks.
